delete.confirmation: Do you really want to remove this event from your cart?
delete.success: The event has been successfully removed from your cart.

create.email_not_found_or_already_verified: No unverified user has been found with this email address.

order_confirmation.body: Thank you for ordering with Homeo sapiens! We have received your order #{{.OrderNumber}} and are awaiting payment.
order_confirmation.heading: Order Confirmation
order_confirmation.subject: Order confirmation #{{.OrderNumber}} — Homeo sapiens

payment_confirmation.body: Your payment has been successfully processed. Thank you for your purchase!
payment_confirmation.heading: Payment Confirmed
payment_confirmation.subject: Payment confirmation #{{.OrderNumber}} — Homeo sapiens

user_email_verification.body_html: You have created a new Homeo sapiens account, or you have changed your email address. To log in, please activate your account by clicking the link below:
user_email_verification.subject: Activate your account — Homeo sapiens

create.success: You have successfully registered for this event.

orders.already_have_an_account_html: Already have an account? Sign in

form.billing_country_helper_text: At the moment, we can only accept payments from customers based in the European Union.
form.billing_email_helper_text: Please make sure your email address is correct.
form.billing_tax_id_helper_text: Fill this field in if you need a VAT invoice.

success.body_html: We have received your payment of {{.Amount}} for the order #{{.OrderNumber}}. We have sent a payment confirmation to your email address: {{.Email}}.
success.title: Order paid

new.unverified_email: The email address has not been verified.
new.unverified_email_html: The email address has not been verified. Resend verification email.

new.already_signed_up_html: Already have an account? Sign in.
new.title: Sign up

success.body_html: Your account has been created. An email containing an activation link has been sent to your email address{{ if .Email }}: {{ .Email }}{{ end }}.
success.gmail_notice_html: You may also confirm your email address using the Sign in with Google feature.
success.title: Registration successful

verify_email.success: Your email has been successfully activated.

validation.validation_is_email: must be a valid email address
